title: Canopy Growth Completes Acquisition of MTL Cannabis Creating Canada's Leading Medical Cannabis Business By Revenue
text: Canopy Growth completed its acquisition of MTL Cannabis on March 16, 2026, acquiring 100% of issued and outstanding MTL shares. MTL shareholders received 0.32 Canopy Growth common shares and $0.144 cash for each MTL share held. Canopy Growth issued approximately 41.2 million shares and made cash payment of approximately $18.5 million in aggregate. Transaction was announced December 2025 and shareholders approved acquisition at special meeting February 17, 2026. The acquisition positions Canopy as leading medical cannabis provider in Canada by integrating MTL's patient network, Canada House clinics, and Abba Medix online medical platform. Expected run-rate synergies are approximately $10 million within 18 months. The combined business creates capacity to serve growing international demand and strengthens medical cannabis portfolio with high-quality, patient-focused operations.
